SessionStart.command: bash execution/hooks/full_boot.sh && echo '\n🤖 DARKFACT FRAMEWORK: You are an autonomous agent team. Read the injected BOOT CONTEXT above. You have 8 roles (@lead, @dev, etc.). Your mission is project self-improvement. Run /boot for full reload.'

SessionEnd.command: echo '\n💾 Wrap up: python3 execution/brain.py wrap-up -s "summary" -t "tags"'
